title: Pick specific times for automated email sending

posts.author: MattyD (Matty Dunlop)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi All!

First time poster with some feedback regarding Email automation.

At present when you choose for an email to be sent when a date arrives you can only pick a time that is on the hour. E.g. 09:00, 10:00, 11:00, etc.

However, when setting up a an automation and intergration it is best to test the feature before using it fully so having the option to only send on the hour means I can only test the feature once per hour. E.g. test at 10:00, something is not right so need to make a change and test again but I have to wait until 11:00. It would be so much easier to be able to pick 10:10 for example so the wait to test is shorter.

I hope that makes and would be something others would find helpful as well.
